problem_title: Travel Rule reviews depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and errors when Travel Rule messages, exceptions, and customer data remain disconnected across multiple providers. This scattered workflow creates gaps in traceability and weakens audit readiness for regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates originator and beneficiary information, message status, exceptions and case management into one end-to-end workflow so compliance teams can review Travel Rule events with full traceability and audit evidence.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case review
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages and exceptions through review, case creation, evidence preservation and decision logging within a structured compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond message routing. Evidence-ready Travel Rule workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule data, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into one workflow layer without replacing message routing or provider systems.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with governed Travel Rule workflows, preserving audit evidence and enabling enterprise deployment for clearer operational control and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, customer data, cases and audit evidence into a single compliance workflow to reduce manual review and improve operational visibility for VASP compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes incomplete or failed Travel Rule messages into structured cases, enabling compliance staff to review, resolve exceptions, log decisions and maintain regulatory context.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and supporting compliance evidence for Travel Rule workflows to help teams prepare for audits and regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers and connects their outputs into one controlled workflow without requiring changes to existing provider integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule validation providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule validation providers but complements them by structuring outputs into operational workflows, case management and audit records.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule exceptions to audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY structures message routing, exceptions, originator and beneficiary data into controlled compliance workflows.
